title: Astralite
description: A vanilla expansion that adds a new end-game armor
body:
**A brand new vanilla-like armor to rebalance the usefulness of dimensions**

This mod adds a new ingot, the Astralite ingot, obtainable after defeating the ender dragon that allows an endgame where resource harvesting and building are simpler.

## The Astral Powder
To build the new armor you need to find Astral Powder that you can find in new structures in the End dimension

![Astral Rock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4386e198e964f6b9fb947e3e61f16dbd5a6a97b4_0.webp)
![Astral Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b30b7a73a186d8c9f85f5631e16218fcd5649f8_0.webp)

In this new structure you will find **Astral Powder** that can be used in a Brewing Stand to purify it and get a **Purified Astral Powder**

![Astral Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7df2c84cb1a77f4d8ff0bcb817ebae154cd349aa.png)
![Purified Astral Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e76361d087a9001e5d88fcd41223c440dd8644.png)

## The Astralite Ingot
When you have gotten the **Purified Astral Powder** it's time to get the ingot!
For that you will have to craft it with 1 Netherite ingot, 2 Obsidians and 1 Eye of Ender.

![Ingot Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb22ffaa3624f9cde6164bb2d4e82631c560397b.png)

## The Astralite Armor
After all of this you will have to do one more step...The Smithing Table! But you will not need the Netherite Upgrade this time but an End Crystal

![Astralite Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b320e365f95d585e53ecf64a211c31118a86a69.png)
![Astralite Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/042ce8af9e4ae65525e5891e30799b3302548451.png)

And with that you have 1 part of the armor! Hey that is an endgame armor that not gonna be easy :)

## Armor Passives

Don't be afraid, just one armor part is gonna carry you a lot. Why? Because all the parts have a passive and the full set too.

**Astralite Helmet :** Grants Conduit Power and immunity to Wither.

**Astralite Chestplate :** Avoid death by teleporting you to a random block within a 15-block radius.

**Astralite Leggings :** Allows you to avoid void death by giving you a second chance.

**Astralite Boots :** Offers the ability to walk on lava (Fire Walker)

**Full set :** Eating a Chorus grants the Golden Apple's effects 

## Tools

Astralite Ingot can be used to craft new tools too! Like the armor parts, all tools have a passive ability.

![Astralite Tolls Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a70e409fa04470936a4e063f78a8c8b266de40.png)

**Astralite Shovel :** Breaks diggable blocks within a 3x3 radius in the player's direction

**Astralite Pickaxe :** Breaks pickaxe-breakable blocks within a 3x3 radius in the player's direction

**Astralite Axe :** Crouch to cut all logs within a 7x7 radius around the broken log (Max 100 blocks high)

**Astralite Hoe :** The ultimate unbreakable farm tool (Almost)

That's all guys! Good luck to get the full set and happy vanilla-like gameplay!
